notes: This file covers the last 10 years only: 2015 through 2024 inclusive.
Each record represents one WMU in one year.
Estimated hunter success percentages are stored as numeric percentages without the percent sign.

WMU 436 in 2021 appeared in the source PDF as a truncated row ('436 0 0%'); it was normalized to male=0, female=0, young=0, total=0, estimated_hunter_success_percent=0 based on the row pattern around it.
The 2024 report states it is a summary of provincial resident harvest combining harvest from general and special licences.
